# Fixture Minimal

A second hermetic fixture: a project caught mid-pipeline. It has run debrief and is in research,
with every later stage still pending, no decisions logged yet, no register, and no prototype. The
board must render this honestly — empty and partial states designed, not crashed.

## Current stage

Current stage: research: researching: round 2, dry-streak 1, open 3, parked 1

The loop is mid-flight: attempting the open unknowns, one dry round so far, with one 🔴 recorded as
a parked decision for the human (the loop keeps running past it).

## Recommended next step

Run `design-studio-research` to sweep the problem space, then pressure-test the riskiest
assumption before it locks in.
